strengths: Clearly identifies three specific real-world objects and situates each in a concrete personal or historical context.
Well-explained links between objects and IA prompt 22, with coherent, evidence-based justifications.
Effective use of personal anecdotes and concrete details to illustrate expert influence on knowledge acquisition.
Strong analysis of the filmâs perspective shift and the book authorâs credentials to demonstrate expert authority.
Inclusion of a bibliography shows awareness of academic conventions and enhances credibility.
weaknesses: Minor precision issues in linking the third object to the concept of âexpertsâ and the prompt.
Some repetition across object justifications, slightly reducing sharpness of analysis.
Incomplete and inconsistent citation format in bibliography and for film image source.
Occasional lack of explicit prompt reference in object commentaries (e.g., film analysis).
Generalized discussion about experts vs. beginners needs concrete comparative evidence.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition clearly meets the descriptors for the 7â8 band: three well-contextualized objects, mostly precise and sustained links to IA prompt 22, and strong evidence-based justifications. Strengths include coherent personal anecdotes, rigorous analysis of expert influence in each object, and clear focus on how knowledge is acquired or shaped by experts. Minor lapsesâsuch as a looser connection of the film to âexperts,â some repetition, and bibliographic formatting errorsâprevent attainment of the 9â10 bandâs consistently sophisticated and flawless standard. An 8 accurately reflects the workâs overall high quality with only slight shortcomings.

annotations.comment: Strong identification and presentation of the IA prompt sets a clear focus for the exhibition from the outset.
The caption for the Lego set is specific and personal, grounding the object in a concrete real-world context.
The student uses a clear personal anecdote to illustrate how YouTube experts guide practical skill acquisition.
The discussion generalizes about experts vs. beginners without naming the specific channel or video; cite the source directly to strengthen the link.
The distinction between expert and beginner would benefit from a concrete comparative example or data point to avoid overly abstract claims.
Nuance is introduced by acknowledging innate talent, but explicitly connect this back to the prompt to clarify relevance.
The caption for âBabelâ clearly states the edition and your personal context, supporting authenticity.
Effectively justifies the authorâs expertise by citing Kuangâs advanced degree to support her authoritative voice.
Well-developed link between expert communication skills and enhanced comprehension through engaging narrative.
The limitation paragraph introduces alternate methods but does not explicitly tie back to the role of experts; make the connection to the prompt clearer.
Good justification of the expertâs role: the YouTuberâs step-by-step guidance clearly facilitates new knowledge acquisition.
Consider citing a specific academic paper as an alternate expert source to illustrate comparison with fictional narrative.
The introduction to the third object situates your experience well, making the choice feel timely and authentic.
The analysis of the filmâs perspective shift powerfully illustrates how expert storytelling reframes historical knowledge.
When linking film to âexperts,â clarify how the director or writer qualifies as an expert influencing knowledge.
Good ethical reflection on balancing perspective with moral responsibility adds depth to the analysis.
The caption lacks full sourcing details for the film image; provide a complete reference to enhance credibility.
The description effectively situates the filmâs narrative but would benefit from an explicit reference to the IA prompt.
The bibliography entry is misformatted and incomplete; adopt a consistent citation style (MLA/APA) to list all sources.
Ensure all sources mentioned (Lego set, YouTube channel) are included in the bibliography to demonstrate thorough referencing.
Remove the word-count line; it is an administrative detail and not part of the exhibition content.
Including a bibliography shows awareness of academic conventions; with formatting improvements this will strengthen scholarly rigor.
The bibliography entry contains OCR artifacts (Ï, \text commands); revise to plain text to avoid confusion.
To reinforce coherence, consider inserting parenthetical references to IA prompt 22 in each objectâs commentary.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
